traces.rootCause: Candidate already advanced (workflow=Paperwork Sent, paperwork=sent). Live P65.6 correctly blocks re-promotion (active_packet). P240 proxy replay incorrectly reported qualification_gate_failed because replayAsFreshNew cleared stage/packet fields but left actionType=await-signature, which still fails canPromoteToPaperworkFunnel.
